Fan Yi śįĺŚ∂∑
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Fan Yi (śįĺŚ∂∑). Sent to take Dong from Wei but was ambushed and killed by Jin Yun. Fan Yi was affiliated with Lu Bu. Fan Yi lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
